# Pre Training

**Summary**: The process of training a model on a large dataset to learn general features before fine-tuning for a specific task.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025]] utilized pre-trained models and self-supervised learning to reduce the need for extensive manual labeling.

## Key Results and Findings

- Pre-training allows the model to develop a structured latent space where similar data points are grouped together. ([[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025, p. 47]])
